overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting exploration of a desert badlands environment. The player traverses concrete platforms, crosses a metal bridge over a canyon, interacts with items on a rooftop, and walks through arid terrain with Joshua trees and red rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned concrete platform in desert badlands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the concrete platform toward a metal bridge spanning the canyon

entered.detail: tall gray concrete barrier wall with weathered surface
layered red sandstone formations in the background
distinctive desert tree with spiky leaves
industrial metal bridge structure spanning the canyon ahead
flat concrete rooftop or platform with graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The player walks across a sunlit concrete platform in a desert wasteland, approaching a metal bridge. Red rock cliffs rise in the background and a Joshua tree stands in the distance. The environment is empty and quiet.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal bridge spanning deep canyon chasm

events.description: steps onto metal bridge crossing over canyon chasm
camera tilts down to look into the canyon depths below

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the metal bridge and looking down into the steep canyon below

entered.detail: deep rocky canyon with steep walls dropping below the bridge
large industrial crane structure spanning across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a narrow metal bridge suspended over a deep canyon. The camera looks down into the chasm revealing the depth below, while a massive industrial crane structure becomes visible spanning the canyon to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon rim pathway with industrial structures

events.description: exits bridge onto canyon edge pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along the canyon rim pathway with the industrial crane structure prominent on the left

entered.detail: narrow concrete path along the edge of the canyon
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving along the canyon rim, the player walks on a concrete path with the massive industrial crane structure now prominent on the left. The landscape opens up to show distant mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop rest area with umbrella and scattered equipment

events.description: player interacts with weapon and optics items on the table

agents.ego_description: approaching the rooftop table under the umbrella to examine weapons and equipment

entered.detail: large multi-colored beach umbrella providing shade
white plastic table with various items on top
metal folding chair next to the table
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
red equipment box and weapons on the table

segments.scene_description: The player discovers a rooftop rest area shaded by a colorful umbrella. Approaching a plastic table, the player interacts with weapons and equipment crates left on the table, with graffiti-covered walls surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete walkway with barriers transitioning to desert

events.description: ground surface transitions from concrete to desert sand

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete barriers and power transmission towers toward the open desert

entered.detail: concrete barriers with red and white stripes
tall metal electrical transmission tower
metal barricade with yellow and black warning stripes
sandy desert terrain replacing the concrete

segments.scene_description: Leaving the rooftop area, the player walks along a concrete path lined with red and white barriers. Power transmission towers stand in the distance as the terrain gradually transitions from concrete to sandy desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert badlands with Joshua trees and rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking through sandy desert terrain among Joshua trees and red rock outcrops

entered.detail: low desert bushes and scrub vegetation
layered red rock outcrops and boulders

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the open desert landscape, walking on sand past Joshua trees and desert shrubs. Red rock formations line the left side while the terrain stretches out toward the distant horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured industrial outpost across a deep canyon and into the open expanse of a red rock desert. It begins on a sunlit concrete platform, moving toward and then crossing a narrow metal bridge that reveals a deep chasm and a massive industrial crane structure. As the camera follows the canyon rim, the scene opens up toward distant mountains before shifting into a shaded rooftop rest area where the player interacts with equipment crates on a table amidst graffiti-covered walls. The path then leads away from the rooftop along a concrete walkway lined with red and white barriers, with power transmission towers appearing as the ground gradually transitions from pavement to sand. Finally, the camera moves fully into the wild desert landscape, passing Joshua trees and shrubs while red rock formations line the way toward the distant horizon.
